issue: I notice that people I assigned the test in October of 2025 have not received new tests. How long do the tests stay active in the system.
subject: Test Active in the system
response:
From Q3' 23 Release Notes Q3' 23 Release Notes:
1. We’ve rolled out a series of new improvements and fixes this October 2023.
2. On request, our team is ready to assist you with the required change management.
3. Please contact us at support@hackerrank.com if you have any questions.
4. Your test administrators will soon have the ability to set defaults that apply to all of your tests.
5. For example, if you'd like all your tests to have plagiarism detection enabled or to have a set of fields that need to be collected, it can be enforced from a central location.
6. You can also ensure that none of your tests have a specific setting.
7. Say, you don't want any of the tests to have video proctoring on, you can disable video proctoring across your tests too.
8. If company administrators lock a setting, only they can modify it.

From What is Code Quality:
1. ***Note**: Currently, we do not provide an overall rating or score for the code quality. Also, we do not evaluate the time complexity of the candidate's code submission. Only the issues in the code are highlighted and described.
2. **Duplications**: The more the number of duplicate blocks of code, the worse is the quality of the code.
3. **Documentation**: A large number of irrelevant comments in the code adversely impacts the code quality.
4. **Issues**: The number of issues with the following three levels of severity:
5. Blocker: The blocker issues have operational or security risks. These issues might make the whole application unstable in production.\
6. Critical: The critical issues have operational or security risks. These issues might lead to unexpected behavior in production without impacting the integrity of the whole application.\
7. Major: These issues might have a substantial impact on productivity.\
8. **Maintainability**: When candidates use code that is easy to implement in the short run instead of applying the best overall solution, it might require extra development work in the long run. This is referred to as long-term technical debt. The more this deb…

If you still need help, use your product’s official support channel.

issue:
I'm noticing that you all have many default versions of roles. (e.g. front end developer for react, angular, vue.js, etc.) What do you consider best practice 
for when to create a new test versus create a variant of the test? What are the advantages and disadvantages of using variants?
subject:
When should I create a variant versus
 have a different test?
response:
From January 2026 Release Notes Screen Skills Platform Developer Experience Integrity Interview Data and Insights Integrations SkillUp Deprecations and Experience Changes:
1. Benchmark calculations include data from 2025 attempts, so comparisons reflect the most recent performance trends.
2. Integrity details are shown at the attempt level, rather than the test level, to reflect the proctoring settings used for each session.
3. Candidate ratings, feedback, and all other collected test data are available directly within the Summary Report.
4. Interviews can be created directly from the new Summary Report.
5. For new attempts, links to Detailed Reports in CSV exports now open up to four times faster.
6. You can now evaluate how candidates leverage AI in solving real-world challenges with a new AI Fluency grade. This is shown in the ‘Performance Summary’ section of the Summary Report for tests taken with the AI Assistant.
7. Scores below the cut-off are no longer shown in red, helping you assess results more objectively.
8. Colors tied to benchmark percentiles have been removed to reduce visual bias when evaluating candidates.

From Question Types in HackerRank Interviews:
1. Multiple Choice
2. Sentence Completion
3. File Upload
4. Cloud
5. Prompt Engineering

If you still need help, use your product’s official support channel.

subject:
How to reinvite candidate to Hackerrank 
assessment and add extra time
response:
From Early Talent:
1. What role are you hiring for?
2. Will they be an intern? Campus hiring? Or blast off to everyone?
3. How can we reduce bias in our hiring process?
4. Who will be your SME?
5. Will there be an ATS integration for housing data?
6. Define a range of skills that you want to hire for
7. Decide question randomization and cutoff scores
8. Structure the processes in place for test validation

From Extend Test Duration for Candidates Add Time Accommodation Add extra time:
1. Add Time Accommodation
2. Add Extra Time
3. You must have a published test in your HackerRank account.
4. You must be the test owner or have editor access.
5. Log in to your **HackerRank for Work** account using your credentials.
6. Go to the **Tests** tab.
7. Select the test you want to modify.
8. Click **Invite**

For anything still unclear, reach out through the official support path for your product.

issue: i signed up using google login on hackerrank community , so i do not have a separate hackerrank password. please delete my account
response:
From Troubleshooting Login Issues Issue 1: Invalid credentials Issue 2: Wrong login page Issue 3: Password or cache:
1. **Cause:** You entered an incorrect email address or password.\
2. **Solution:**
3. Verify that you are entering the correct email address and password.
4. If you signed up using a third-party account (Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, or GitHub), use the same platform to log in.
5. Select **Forgot Password** on the login page to reset your credentials if needed.
6. Remove any saved passwords from your browser before trying again.
7. **Cause:** You are trying to log in using HackerRank business URL instead of the HackerRank for developer URL.
8. **Solution:** Use the following HackerRank for developer login URL: https://www.hackerrank.com/signup

From Delete an Account:
1. Log in to the HackerRank Community using your credentials.
2. Click the profile icon in the top-right corner.
3. Select **Settings** from the drop-down menu. The **Settings** page appears under the **Account** section.
4. Scroll to the **Delete Accounts** section.
5. Click **Delete Account**. A confirmation dialog box appears.
6. Select a reason for deleting your account from the available options:
7. I get too many emails
8. I want to clear all my submissions

If this doesn’t match what you see, contact official support for your product.

issue:
One of my claude conversations has some private info, i forgot to make a temporary chat, is there anything
 else that can be done? like delete etc?
response:
From I would like to input sensitive data into my chats with Claude. Who can view my conversations?:
1. We automatically de-link your data from your user ID (like your email address) before any review.
2. Access is limited to a small number of personnel involved in model training.
3. We will use tools and processes derived from our work on privacy-preserving analysis tools to filter or obfuscate sensitive data. In addition to that, our pioneering research in post-training techniques helps to minimize the amount of personal data included i…
4. Your data is used solely to make Claude better for everyone - we do not use such personal data to contact people, build profiles about them, to try to sell or market anything to them, or to sell the information itself to any third party.
5. You maintain full control and can adjust your privacy settings at any time.
6. Your incognito chats are not used to improve Claude, even if you have enabled Model Improvement in your Privacy Settings. Learn more about incognito chats.
7. Financial information (SSN, credit card numbers, bank account details)
8. Health records or medical information

From Using incognito chats:
1. Incognito chats are not used for training. See our Privacy Center for more information:
2. **Is my data used for model training?** (for Free, Pro, and Max plans)
3. **Is my data used for model training?** (for Team and Enterprise plans)
4. While incognito chats aren't saved to your chat history, they are retained for either 30 days (default), or longer in accordance with your organization's custom data retention setting (available for Enterprise plans).
5. Claude won’t pull information from incognito chats when searching previous conversations.
6. If you are using Claude’s memory:
7. Starting an incognito chat won’t use Claude’s existing memory.
8. Incognito chats will not be included in future memory summaries.

For anything still unclear, reach out through the official support path for your product.
